prompt: Comic book page layout, {argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"} ratio. Title: "{argument name="title" default="5 tips for a good Friday"}" 5 panels with consistent character throughout. Warm, gentle lighting. Panel 1: Character drinking coffee by a window, golden morning light. Caption: "Friday mornings are for breathing. The rest can wait." Panel 2: Character sending a message to a friend, sincere smiles. Caption: "One kind word can carry someone through the whole weekend." Panel 3: Character drawing or creating, absorbed in the moment. Caption: "You don't need to finish it. You just need to start." Panel 4: Character walking outside, hands in pockets, looking up at trees and sky. Caption: "The world is still beautiful. You just have to look up." Panel 5: Character peaceful, soft lighting, quiet smile. Caption: "You made it through another week. That's enough. That's everything."
translatedPrompt: 漫画页面排版，{argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"} 比例。标题："{argument name="title" default="5 个度过美好周五的小贴士"}"，5 个分镜格，角色贯穿始终且保持一致。温暖、柔和的灯光。第 1 格：角色在窗边喝咖啡，金色的晨光。标题：“周五早晨是用来呼吸的。剩下的事可以等一等。” 第 2 格：角色给朋友发信息，真诚的微笑。标题：“一句暖心的话语就能支撑某人度过整个周末。” 第 3 格：角色在绘画或创作，沉浸在当下。标题：“你不需要立刻完成它。你只需要开始。” 第 4 格：角色在户外行走，双手插兜，抬头仰望树木和天空。标题：“世界依然美丽。你只需要抬头看看。” 第 5 格：角色神情宁静，柔和的灯光，安静的微笑。标题：“你又度过了充实的一周。这就够了。这就代表了一切。”

breakdown.creativeCore: 漫画页面排版：一个用于创建五格漫画页面的综合提示词，包含一致的角色设定和叙事标题。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: soft light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
